queries: session start hook stop hook memory progress active change runtime verify start-change repo entry current status docs and hooks for enterprise harness
runtime verify doctor status-like smoke tests hook tests scripts patterns in harness/plugin/runtime and hooks

decisions: 本轮按 L3 平台规则 / 架构语义收紧执行，而不是 L2 文档增强
采用静态 PROGRESS.md + 动态 status 命令的双层进度面
动态真相优先级固定为 harness/ACTIVE_CHANGE + harness/changes/*/state.json；PROGRESS.md 只承载阶段快照与阅读入口
change-specific 结论写回当前 change 资产，repo-level 阶段信息写回 PROGRESS.md，Claude memory 只保留显式动作下的非仓库事实
status 作为新的 top-level runtime CLI 子命令接入，并要求稳定的 --json 输出契约
Stop 只输出 handoff / memory 边界提醒，不宣称自动写 memory
